requested.description: The requested/sticky primary harness the chip showed.

effective.description: The harness that actually ran first, or null when nothing remained routable.

reason.description: Typed reason an auto-fallback (route/auth switch) or session re-host happened, driven by typed budget/quota signals and events, never by regex over prose.

detail.description: Redacted human reason the primary was dropped (e.g. cooldown, unavailable).

RoutePrimaryDivergedPayload.description: Typed payload for route.primary.diverged, validated before being stamped onto the RunEvent payload so a pre-attempt primary divergence is always evidence-backed.
